2cfce2c2-0068-4810-9222-e9b899bb568d.title: Evaluate Microsoft Agent Framework
2cfce2c2-0068-4810-9222-e9b899bb568d.description: Follow-up to Evaluate Microsoft AutoGen. Microsoft Agent Framework (MAF) is the production successor to AutoGen (which entered maintenance mode in 2026). AutoGen is the lineage; MAF is the new foundation. This issue evaluates MAF against the EDASES layered architecture and updates capability-mapping/Harness-Capability-Matrix.md with a MAF column. Scope: same template as the AutoGen evaluation (harness-evaluations/_template.md). Strategic Rationale: any EDASES adoption of AutoGen is investment in a sunsetting framework; MAF evaluation is required before any architectural commitment. See selection-rationale/2026-06-23-microsoft-agent-framework.md for the full Rationale and Alternatives considered. Apply Heuristic Scouting methodology (methodology-reviews/Heuristic-Scouting.md). Sources: microsoft/agent-framework GitHub, learn.microsoft.com migration guide, MS Research pages.

03a07f0d-8377-48e7-869e-8071234a5b3f.author: OL2r
03a07f0d-8377-48e7-869e-8071234a5b3f.content: Added AGENTS.md specifying that agents must stop and ask for direction if a fresh session/subagent fails, rather than silently substituting the current context. Also updated reviews-5.md/6 to reflect that the swarm selection phase is blocked pending proper zero-context review.

1903bdf3-dab2-49b1-b2fb-d2e2323cfce2.author: OL2r
1903bdf3-dab2-49b1-b2fb-d2e2323cfce2.content: Concluded the documentation process refactor design. Conducted 5 rounds of parallel, multi-model adversarial reviews (Gemini, GLM 5.1, Claude, Deepseek, ChatGPT) of our metadata, queue, and transaction lifecycles. Resolved the critical git, locking, and distributed db silo bugs. Created, committed, and pushed a complete, self-contained Dual-Architecture Orchestration Specification (.design/dual-architecture-orchestration-spec.md) detailing two mathematically sound options: (1) CQRS & Event-Sourced SQLite-Cache, and (2) Git-Log Append-Only JSONL LSM. Registered the adversarial-reviewers-analysis and beds24-booking-system-evolution knowledge pages in Crosslink.

ee75414a-047f-4527-97f3-45ebb11583a9.author: OL2r
ee75414a-047f-4527-97f3-45ebb11583a9.content: Completed native clean-room Gemini 3.1 Pro adversarial review via 'opencode run'. The fresh review has been committed to .design/reviews-6-gemini.md.
